there will be consequences only if the majority of american people start to rebel/demonstrate against him
Trump is a dangerous person to his enemies, I keep saying. The silly, goofy showman is just a role for the people. he is a well-calculated agressive man, who knows what he's doing.

comment.body:
stock price is a multivariable equation. and as almost everything is algorhytmized, it can be played and manipulated at its core. 
crises like in the past are not reality anymore, only if the country is running out of sources to back the sentiment. and the US is way the farthest from that in the world. 
valuation must be repriced time to time but thats it... it cannot be too fast... but think in yearly window

comment.body:
A federal appeals court ruled that most of President Donald Trump’s global tariffs are illegal, striking a massive blow to the core of his aggressive trade policy.
Friday’s ruling is the Trump administration’s second straight loss in the make-or-break case known as V.O.S. Selections v. Trump.
Trump attacked the appeals court as “Highly Partisan” and asserted that the Supreme Court will rule in his favor.

comment.body: One of my related long term question is "Are authoritarian regimes all the same?" On both extreme left and extreme right, we find authoritarianism. Can we infer from historic evidences that it is somewhat easier to transition from rightist authoritarianism into free democracy? And a even bigger question is whether democracy will/should survive in the future... QE in some sense is a way to bribe the electorate...

user.name: han
user.bio: Mch7a7

comment.body:
In terms of human good, neither regime is good. Story is as old as time itself and in the past kings prospered and the peasants suffered. No matter whether it is the new holy axis or the left or the politburo elite of China, it will concentrate money and power in the hands of few. True democracy does not exist in most parts of the world. Just look at Africa, Middle east, South America and you will see war lords, autocrats and dictators all masquerading as heads of state. In Usa and Europe, it is a plutocracy veiled as democracy where the deep state, rich elites are controlling the game. 

Trump will be taught a lesson by the midterms (Nov 2026)  since Inflation will be brutal and common man will feel the pinch vs his elite buddies who are loving this bubble. Repubs will receive a drubbing and will lose control of the house thereby destroying the easy path to passing any bills. Yes he can blow this bubble all the way till next  year if he wants. 

Best thing one could do is learn from the writings of a master like Alma, make money and then disconnect from this chaos having achieved financial freedom. Just travel the world, seek love and peace, consume minimal resources, focus on one's own family and lend a helping hand to those who are down whenever possible. 

Just my two cents.

comment.body:
A federal appeals court ruled that most of President Donald Trump’s global tariffs are illegal, striking a massive blow to the core of his aggressive trade policy.
Friday’s ruling is the Trump administration’s second straight loss in the make-or-break case known as V.O.S. Selections v. Trump.
Trump attacked the appeals court as “Highly Partisan” and asserted that the Supreme Court will rule in his favor.

comment.body: AGI is nothing more than an AI agent that will be able to do what the normal/average 100IQ human can do in the workplace. That is coming, and better soon. “Superintelligence” is what I think people are thinking of when referring to AGI. That, is very far away, and I think will need quantum computing advancements to happen. It’ll happen in our lifetimes but it’s not going to be an LLM, but the LLM’s are the foundation it will be built upon. Just an opinion

comment.body:
From the long term post,
“I’m watching:
122,056.68 is our major local resistance, but the true “line in the sand” is 107,500.61 - this levels will prove us if BTC spot wants a melt up towards 143,519.88 before taking its gains back, or if it has already topped. 
My main target zone where I’m interested to buy into BTC is 56,183.44 - 67,250.15 “

Alma, do you think the BTC will get a chance to reach the 56000-67000 zone in this Sept pull back? We just hit the 17500 line. And seems BTC pull back is leading the stocks.

comment.body: My guess is, her assessment leans towards a pumped market and put-off bad days (deflationary spiral, debt crisis etc.). For the fast evolving tech sector 2-3 years can be seen as long-term I guess, but hardly so in Buffet-Munger or Lynch's term; so perhaps by the end of Trump's presidency there would be a grand reshuffling.
